complaint: A scary orange car-with-exclamation-mark warning keeps popping up and my dash says the cooling fans are running loud even when parked. I'm worried the battery is overheating and could be dangerous.
observations: Battery coolant reservoir found below minimum cold-fill line
Slow weep and dried coolant residue at a thermal-loop hose clamp fitting
Pack temperatures and state-of-charge remain within normal operating range
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'battery thermal-management coolant hose clamp and refill'.
